result.stdout:
Description:
  BlazeUI CLI — scaffold styled Blazor components

Usage:
  BlazeUI.UI.CLI [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  init                Initialize BlazeUI in your project
  add <component>     Add a styled component to your project
  list                List available components
  update <component>  Update an installed component to the latest template

commands.payload:
Description:
  BlazeUI CLI — scaffold styled Blazor components

Usage:
  BlazeUI.UI.CLI [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  init                Initialize BlazeUI in your project
  add <component>     Add a styled component to your project
  list                List available components
  update <component>  Update an installed component to the latest template

result.stdout:
Description:
  Add a styled component to your project

Usage:
  BlazeUI.UI.CLI add [<component>] [options]

Arguments:
  <component>  Component name to add (e.g. button, dialog)

Options:
  --overwrite     Overwrite existing component files
  --all           Add all available components
  --dry-run       Preview files without writing
  --path <path>   Project directory (defaults to current directory)
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Add a styled component to your project

Usage:
  BlazeUI.UI.CLI add [<component>] [options]

Arguments:
  <component>  Component name to add (e.g. button, dialog)

Options:
  --overwrite     Overwrite existing component files
  --all           Add all available components
  --dry-run       Preview files without writing
  --path <path>   Project directory (defaults to current directory)
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Initialize BlazeUI in your project

Usage:
  BlazeUI.UI.CLI init [options]

Options:
  --path <path>                      Project directory (defaults to current directory)
  --component-path <component-path>  Component output path (default: Components/UI)
  --css-path <css-path>              CSS output path (default: wwwroot/css)
  --namespace <namespace>            Component namespace
  --base-color <base-color>          Base color theme (neutral, stone, zinc, mauve, olive, mist, taupe)
  --accent-color <accent-color>      Accent color for primary/charts (amber, blue, cyan, emerald, fuchsia, green, indigo, lime, orange, pink, purple, red, rose, sky, teal, violet, yellow)
  -y, --yes                          Skip prompts, use defaults
  -?, -h, --help                     Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Initialize BlazeUI in your project

Usage:
  BlazeUI.UI.CLI init [options]

Options:
  --path <path>                      Project directory (defaults to current directory)
  --component-path <component-path>  Component output path (default: Components/UI)
  --css-path <css-path>              CSS output path (default: wwwroot/css)
  --namespace <namespace>            Component namespace
  --base-color <base-color>          Base color theme (neutral, stone, zinc, mauve, olive, mist, taupe)
  --accent-color <accent-color>      Accent color for primary/charts (amber, blue, cyan, emerald, fuchsia, green, indigo, lime, orange, pink, purple, red, rose, sky, teal, violet, yellow)
  -y, --yes                          Skip prompts, use defaults
  -?, -h, --help                     Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Update an installed component to the latest template

Usage:
  BlazeUI.UI.CLI update <component> [options]

Arguments:
  <component>  Component name to update

Options:
  --diff          Show diff between installed and latest template
  --force         Overwrite even if local modifications detected
  --path <path>   Project directory (defaults to current directory)
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Update an installed component to the latest template

Usage:
  BlazeUI.UI.CLI update <component> [options]

Arguments:
  <component>  Component name to update

Options:
  --diff          Show diff between installed and latest template
  --force         Overwrite even if local modifications detected
  --path <path>   Project directory (defaults to current directory)
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
